caption: The video features a man seated in a radio studio, engaging in what appears to be a podcast or talk show segment titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black cap, headphones, and a dark t-shirt with the phrase "CHECK IT!" printed on it. The man is speaking into a microphone, gesturing with his right hand as he communicates, suggesting an animated conversation or explanation. The background includes a banner with stars and text that reads "Unique Hustle," along with a partially visible logo for "Boss Talk 101." The setting is professional, with a focus on the host's interaction with the audience or co-hosts.
